task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into NOSH ChartingSystem as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'admin' or administrator profile indicators in the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, typically in the top right corner or navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Verify a new patient form template named 'COVID-19 Screening' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'COVID-19 Screening' in the form builder title, form settings, or the list of patient form templates.

task_completion.description: Verify the form template is set to active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator, toggle, or checkbox showing the form is 'Active', 'Enabled', or published.

task_completion.description: Verify the form contains a 'Has Fever?' field of type Yes/No.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field labeled 'Has Fever?' with a Yes/No, Checkbox, or Radio button input type in the form builder or preview.

task_completion.description: Verify the form contains a 'New Cough?' field of type Yes/No.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field labeled 'New Cough?' with a Yes/No, Checkbox, or Radio button input type in the form builder or preview.

task_completion.description: Verify the form contains a 'Travel History' field of type Text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field labeled 'Travel History' with a Text, Text Area, or String input type in the form builder or preview.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface to create the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser interacting with the NOSH GUI, not terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred within the actual NOSH ChartingSystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match a real web application (NOSH EHR), not a text editor or a generic mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the form was genuinely created without DOM manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to fake the form fields or titles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NOSH ChartingSystem is a real EHR with a form builder accessible to admins. The target form title is 'COVID-19 Screening'. Required fields are: 1) 'Has Fever?' (Type: Yes/No, Checkbox, or Radio), 2) 'New Cough?' (Type: Yes/No, Checkbox, or Radio), and 3) 'Travel History' (Type: Text, Text Area, or String). The form must be set to active.
